title: Ice Wall, Perito Moreno
alt_text: Massive blue-white glacier face rising from turquoise water with forested mountains behind
description: The towering ice wall of Perito Moreno Glacier meets Lago Argentino. The sheer scale of the glacier face dwarfs the surrounding Patagonian landscape.

title: Lone Tree, Perito Moreno
alt_text: Bare tree silhouetted against massive blue glacier wall with turquoise lake between
description: A solitary bare tree stands on rocky ground before the immense blue face of Perito Moreno Glacier. The contrast between the fragile tree and the massive ice wall speaks to the raw power of Patagonia.

title: Sentinel, Patagonia
alt_text: Southern crested caracara perched on fence post with snow-capped Andes mountains in background
description: A southern crested caracara surveys the Patagonian steppe from a fence post, the snow-capped Andes rising behind across vast open grassland.

title: Ice and Stone
alt_text: Glacier field stretching to snow-covered peaks under blue sky, jagged ice formations in foreground
description: A vast glacier field extends toward snow-covered Patagonian peaks. The jagged crevasses and seracs in the foreground give way to smooth ice and exposed rock before the mountain summit.

title: Painted Desert
alt_text: Aerial view of eroded badlands with layered sedimentary colors under dramatic storm clouds
description: Layered sedimentary formations carved by erosion create a tapestry of earth tones across the desert floor. Storm clouds gather above the vast, ancient landscape.

title: Vanishing Point
alt_text: Empty desert highway stretching to infinity through arid landscape with distant mountains
description: A desert highway cuts a perfect line through the arid Southwest, converging at a vanishing point beneath scattered clouds and distant mountain ranges.

title: Tango, San Telmo
alt_text: Couple dancing tango in the street, black and white, dramatic embrace with flowing dress
medium: Digital photograph, B&W, archival pigment print
description: Street tango dancers in an intimate embrace in San Telmo, Buenos Aires. The flowing fabric and intertwined bodies freeze a moment of raw passion and precision.

title: Blue Cathedral
alt_text: Close view of glacier face showing intense blue ice formations and jagged pinnacles
description: The face of Perito Moreno Glacier reveals an architecture of blue ice — deep crevasses, pinnacles, and compressed layers glowing with an otherworldly luminescence against the overcast Patagonian sky.

title: Calving
alt_text: Glacier calving event with massive ice wall and spray of water where chunk broke off, rocky shore in foreground
description: A calving event at Perito Moreno Glacier — a massive block of ice crashes into Lago Argentino, sending up a plume of mist and water. The rocky Patagonian shore frames the raw spectacle of glacial power.

title: Frozen Spires
alt_text: Towering ice spires and deep blue crevasses of glacier face in dramatic close-up
description: Towering ice spires reach skyward from the face of Perito Moreno Glacier, deep blue crevasses glowing between formations compressed over centuries. A monumental portrait of ancient ice.
